title: lomatium californicum
intro: Lomatium californicum, also known as California buttercup or Lewis' lewisia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral and antibacterial compounds that help to fight off infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lomatium californicum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Herbal preparations of Lomatium californicum can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support respiratory health and prevent illness during the winter months.
